label: SLMP Device Matrix
info: High-level one-by-one sample for every device code in the sample catalog. The flow sends each sample to slmp-read/slmp-write with slmpSkipUnsupported=true; the node itself decides unsupported device codes from the configured connection plcFamily and routes those results as SKIPPED instead of making the matrix node red.

name: High-level one-by-one read/write sample with JSONL logging, timeout tracking, and unsupported-device skip records
Edit the catalog in 'Prepare next device sample' before deploy. Completed results append to logs/slmp-device-matrix-<session>.jsonl
Prepare next device sample (edit catalog here)
Finalize read result
Finalize read error
Mark write ok + read back
Finalize write error
Show current matrix summary
Finalize timed out operations
Auto run status lamp
